comment: Per-scenario regression thresholds. Run via AWS2AZURE_PERF=1; values reflect emulator-bound baselines captured on the project's reference dev hardware. See docs/perf/baseline-latest.md for the live observed numbers. Operators bump these values manually when a deliberate change to the proxy raises or lowers expected throughput. minThroughputPerSec floors observed ops/s; maxP99Ms ceilings observed p99. Either can be 0 to opt out of that half of the gate.
